locked.coi_flag: Federal loans/subsidies required. Trump family ownership creates potential preferential treatment risk vs. competing startups.

barriers.title: Tritium Scarcity
barriers.detail: ~25kg global supply. Lithium blanket breeding unproven at commercial scale.

barriers.title: Materials Degradation
barriers.detail: Neutron bombardment degrades structural components faster than fission. No material validated for full commercial duty cycle. EU €340M research program launched Jan 2026.

barriers.title: Timeline Slippage History
barriers.detail: ITER over $22B and years behind. Fusion timelines have historically slipped by 5-10 years across all major programs.

barriers.title: Net Energy Positive at Grid Scale
barriers.detail: NIF achieved ignition in 2022 but energy output was laser-input dependent. Commercial energy positive remains undemonstrated at utility scale.

milestone_banner.text: Helion's Polaris reached 150 million degree plasma temperature in February 2026 while EAST tokamak exceeded the Greenwald density limit in January, as CFS received DOE magnet validation and applied for grid connection.

kstar.name: KSTAR
kstar.description: South Korean government tokamak confirmed successful fusion tests in Feb 2026 following 102-second plasma record. Operating in tungsten environment with advanced boron injection for impurity control.

cfs.name: Commonwealth Fusion
cfs.description: DOE validated successful magnet technology performance test; first production magnet delivered and reactor magnet installed. CFS applied for grid connection for planned ARC fusion plant in Virginia while SPARC remains on track for 2027.

helion.name: Helion Energy
helion.description: Polaris achieved 150 million degree plasma temperature milestone in Feb 2026, setting industry record. Reported in negotiations with OpenAI for additional PPA alongside existing Microsoft agreement.

tae.name: TAE Technologies / TMTG
tae.description: TAE-Trump Media $6B merger progressing with TMTG considering Truth Social spinout into separate listed company while pursuing TAE combination. SEC S-4 review ongoing with mid-2026 close target intact.

iter.name: ITER
iter.description: US ITER completed final deliveries for the central solenoid magnet, a critical component. French nuclear regulator exempted vacuum vessel from fission-based regulation, enabling fit-for-purpose fusion regulatory approach.

east.name: EAST / China Program
east.description: EAST tokamak exceeded the Greenwald density limit in January 2026, achieving plasma densities previously thought impossible. This breakthrough positions China's fusion program as a leading contender alongside KSTAR in sustained plasma research.

timeline.title: Merger Announced
timeline.detail: All-stock deal signed. Boards approved. DJT stock +33% on day of.

timeline.title: $200M Cash to TAE at Signing
timeline.detail: Additional $100M available on SEC Form S-4 filing.

timeline.title: Shareholder + Regulatory Close
timeline.detail: SEC S-4 review ongoing. TMTG considering Truth Social spinout into separate listed company. Trump Jr. joins board. Mid-2026 close target intact.

timeline.title: Plant Site Selection Begins
timeline.detail: Nunes stated site search begins after deal closes.

timeline.title: First Power Generation Target
timeline.detail: TAE's stated goal for first electricity from utility-scale plant.

dynamic.auto_update_summary: Auto-updated 6/6 companies via Claude + RSS. Locked fields unchanged.
